--- Page 5 ---

4.7 If you choose any college, how much is the college fee?** 58,000

**4.8 If the college fee is higher, how will you manage it?** Sell their Gold, or arrange from relatives

**4.9 If you do not receive this scholarship, how will you pay the fees?** Same as 4.8. (Pay her fees from someone's money)

**6.2 If we have a training program within 15 km from your home, can you come?** Yes
  [●] Yes

  [●] Yes
  [○] No

## Section 7 — Scholarship Information
**

--- Page 6 ---

7.1 Has the student received or applied for any other scholarships for their UG degree?** No

## Section 8 — Volunteer Observation
**8.1 What is your opinion about the student, their family members, and their living condition?** 
My opinion from their Family Background is very poor. Her father has only weekly wages, sometimes she does not have painting job also. She is the elder one to support her family.

**8.2 Will you recommend this student for this scholarship?** Yes
  [●] Yes
  [○] No
  [○] Not Sure

**8.3 Any other comments you want to share?**
